title: KAPA2G Fast PCR
description: Roche KAPA2G Fast ReadyMix (2X): 25 uL fast standard-Taq reaction, optimized for amplicons under 1 kb.

payload.notes: Vendor: Roche / KAPA Biosystems, KAPA2G Fast ReadyMix 2X (Cat. KK5101 / KR0374), a fast Taq replacement best for amplicons <1 kb (GC 35-65%). Set up on ice. Annealing: 60 C works for most assays (adjust in 2 C steps); excessive anneal times cause nonspecific products. Use 5 min at 95 C for the initial denaturation with >70% GC templates. Cycles 25-40. Extension: as little as 1 sec/cycle for amplicons <= 1 kb on fast cyclers; 15 sec/kb for >1 kb (increase to max 1 min/kb in 15 sec steps). The 15 sec/kb shown is a safe default. Official ramp-tuned hold times: fast cyclers (>3 C/sec) 15/15/5 sec; slow cyclers (1-3 C/sec) 10/10/1 sec; max-yield (all cyclers) 15/15/15 sec (denature/anneal/extend). Source: Roche / KAPA Biosystems KAPA2G Fast ReadyMix PCR Kit (cat. KK5101 / KR0374); official KR0374 Technical Data Sheet, distributor-hosted copy at https://digitalassets.avantorsciences.com/adaptivemedia/rendition?id=fe79ca3bbd699e661afb07b4988f65a9c328582e
